name: MultiSigSwapHook
description: A hook implementing multi-signature requirements for swap execution. Before a swap can be executed, it must be approved by a minimum number of authorized signers. Signers can approve swaps off-chain, and once the required threshold is met, the swap proceeds. After execution, the approval is cleared. The hook owner can add/remove signers and adjust the required signature threshold.
whenToUse: Use when you need institutional-grade swap controls, such as treasury management, institutional trading desks, or any scenario requiring multiple parties to approve trades before execution. Ideal for protocols with multi-sig treasury or institutional liquidity providers.

params.label: Signer Addresses
params.hint: One address per line. Each swap above the configured threshold requires M-of-N approvals from this set.

params.label: Required Signatures (M)
params.hint: Number of signers that must approve before a swap executes. Must be ≤ total signers.
